requirements.note: Divides 1 second into 24 frames. Inherited Zenin technique.

abilities.name: 24 FPS Frame Rule
abilities.description: Split 1 second into 24 frames. Preset movement traces.

mechanics.special_effect: Blitz-speed movement. Palm touch freezes non-compliant targets in frame for 1 second. Bypasses eye tracking.

domain_expansion.name: Time Cell Moon Palace
domain_expansion.description: Womb-like domain with giant eye. Enforces 24 FPS rules on cellular level.

mechanics.special_effect: Sure-hit film lines shatter cells. Total body freeze/destruction from inside out.
